holodeck.heading: Command every signal from ground to orbit

cards.title: Constellation orchestration
cards.description: Coordinate thousands of low-Earth orbit satellites as one adaptive mesh — dynamically routing bandwidth, balancing loads, and maintaining seamless global coverage.
cards.alt: Earth viewed from space with satellite network visualization

cards.title: Ultra-low latency ground link
cards.description: Edge ground stations process uplink data in milliseconds — enabling real-time decisions for autonomous fleets, emergency response, and precision agriculture.
cards.alt: Satellite dish array at a ground station facility

cards.title: Quantum-resilient secure uplink
cards.description: End-to-end encrypted channels with post-quantum key exchange protect mission-critical payloads from interception across every hop in the network.
cards.alt: Cybersecurity visualization with encrypted data streams

cards.title: Predictive telemetry intelligence
cards.description: AI models analyze orbital telemetry streams to predict anomalies before they impact service — reducing downtime and extending asset lifespan across the fleet.
cards.alt: Digital globe with data points representing telemetry

cards.title: Unified mission operations hub
cards.description: A single command interface for launch, deployment, station-keeping, and de-orbit — giving operators full situational awareness across every mission phase.
cards.alt: Engineer monitoring mission operations on multiple screens
